title: trollius laxus subsp. albiflorus
intro: Trollius laxus subsp. albiflorus, also known as the White-flowered Globe-flower, is a plant species belonging to the buttercup family and native to mountainous regions in China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Trollius laxus subsp. albiflorus are said to include relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Trollius laxus subsp. albiflorus is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its roots and flowers are used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
